Off Calendar Jul-15-2016 Continued To Aug-30-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Defendant City And County Of San Francisco Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses By Plaintiff To (1) Form Interrogatories; (2) Special Interrogatories (Sets One And Two); And (3) Request For Production Of Documents, And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Jul-08-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
David A. Delbon, of Office of the City Attorney, Tel. 415.554.3800, for defendants;
No other appearances.

Ruling: The matter was not argued. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO Motion To Compel Responses By Plaintiff To (1) Form Interrogatories; (2) Special Interrogatories (Sets One And Two); And (3) Request For Production Of Documents, And For Sanctions is granted, no opposition. Plaintiff shall serve objection-free responses to all discovery requests that were the subject of this motion within 20 days of service of this order. Sanctions are granted in the amount of $1,500 against MARIA ESTELLA MARTINEZ payable to the City and County of San Francisco within 30 days of service of this order. Order signed. Judge Pro Tem: Charles Geerhart; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 302.

Off Calendar Apr-21-2016 Continued To Jun-07-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Apr-22-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Attorney Geraldine Armendariz telephone number 415-986-0873 for Plaintiff Maria Martinez.
No other appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

Ms. Armendariz stated that documents were personally handed to Ms. Martinez by a messenger and mailed, that Ms. Martinez has another Attorney, and that the other Attorney has filed a complaint against the driver/defendant, but not against the City. ATTORNEY GERALDINE ARMENDARIZ'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL OF RECORD FOR PLAINTIFF MARIA MARTINEZ is granted. Order signed in open Court.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)
